message:
feat(hop): migrate entity:// URI scheme to hop://

EntityRef.URI() now returns hop://<platform>/<org>/<id> instead of the
legacy entity://hop/<platform>/<org>/<id> format, per GRAPH-ARCHITECTURE.md.
ParseEntityURI() accepts both schemes for backward compatibility.

Closes: bd-yi8

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/quartz

Role: polecats
